interact_data: > LILY: Hi there! I'm an example of an NPC.
> You can pick up things like potions by pressing the SPACE bar when you're near them.
> But, you can only hold one of them at a time.
> If you need to put them down, just hit SPACE again where you picked them up.
> Can you bring me that one over there?
> You can give it to me just by interacting with me while you're holding it.
> LILY: Try bringing me that potion over there.

blue_potion: > NPCs will reward you with TREASURE for finishing all their requests.
> The other kind of request you'll do is selecting other items to ask NPCs about from the menu.
> I'll give you this for an example.
> Try interacting with me again and asking me about it.
> When the menu comes up, use the number keys to select the relevant item.

letter from Lily: > LILY: Perfect! You'll hold on to these items throughout the task, but they'll let you prompt NPCs to fulfill their requests.
> You can press Q to start the task.
